edits.slides.19.highlight: Stacking pre- and post-treatment scans at adjustable opacity made the change visible at a glance — clinicians could see it instead of holding it in memory.

setFields.slides.20.highlight: Before the redesign, clinicians paused to recall what each icon meant. Named panels removed that step.

slides.5.quotes.text: It feels like a long boring form — and I'm doing it with a patient in the chair.
slides.5.quotes.author: Restorative specialist

slides.5.quotes.text: I change the procedure multiple times before I even begin scanning.
slides.5.quotes.author: General dentist

slides.5.quotes.text: The moment I go looking for a tool, I lose my rhythm completely.
slides.5.quotes.author: Orthodontist

slides.5.quotes.text: I never fully trust the result the first time I see it.
slides.5.quotes.author: Restorative specialist
